# Rajath Kiran A — Portfolio & AI/Cloud Engineer

> Full Stack Developer & AI Builder | CS @ VCET | 2026 Internships

## About
Rajath Kiran A is a 3rd-year Computer Science student at Vivekananda College of Engineering and Technology (VCET), Mangalore, specializing in AI/ML, Cloud Engineering (GCP), and Full Stack Development. He builds AI-powered healthcare solutions and cloud-native applications.

- **Location:** Mangalore, Karnataka, India
- **Email:** rajathajeru@gmail.com
- **Phone:** +91 9113275894
- **Open to:** 2026 Internships (Cloud, AI/ML, Full Stack)
- **Relocation:** Open to relocation

## Core Expertise
- **Cloud Engineering:** Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Kubernetes (GKE), Docker, HTTP(S) Load Balancing, Compute Engine, Pub/Sub, Terraform
- **AI & Machine Learning:** TensorFlow, PyTorch, CNN, LSTM, NLP, RAG architectures, Scikit-learn
- **Frontend:** React.js, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, Three.js, JavaScript
- **Backend:** Node.js, Python Flask, Express.js, REST APIs
- **Databases:** Supabase, PostgreSQL, Firebase, MongoDB
- **Languages:** Python, JavaScript, Java, C++, C

## Key Projects

### COPD Detection & Severity Classification
- **URL:** https://github.com/Rajath2005/COPD-Detection
- **Category:** Healthcare AI, Deep Learning
- **Description:** Deep learning system for COPD screening using respiratory sound analysis (CNN + CNN-LSTM architectures) — ongoing research.
- **Tech:** Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, CNN, LSTM, Signal Processing

### AyuDost AI
- **URL:** https://ayudost-chatbot.onrender.com/
- **Category:** Healthcare AI, NLP
- **Description:** AI-powered Ayurvedic healthcare platform with NLP chatbot, disease prediction using Ayurvedic principles, and personalized health recommendations.
- **Tech:** React, Node.js, Python, NLP, TensorFlow, Supabase, RAG

### MediQ Health Platform
- **URL:** https://mediq-health.netlify.app/
- **Category:** Healthcare, Web Platform
- **Description:** Ayurvedic health consultation platform with AI-driven treatment recommendations, symptom analysis, and personalized wellness plans.
- **Tech:** React, Node.js, Supabase, TailwindCSS

### Highly Available Web App on GCP
- **URL:** http://cloud.rajathkiran.me/
- **Category:** Cloud Infrastructure
- **Description:** Compute Engine deployment with HTTP(S) Load Balancing, health checks, and multi-VM traffic distribution on Google Cloud Platform.
- **Tech:** GCP, Compute Engine, Load Balancing, Cloud Networking

### Microservices on GKE
- **URL:** http://cloud.rajathkiran.me/
- **Category:** Kubernetes, DevOps
- **Description:** Containerized microservices deployed on Google Kubernetes Engine with auto-scaling, networking, and workload monitoring.
- **Tech:** GKE, Docker, Kubernetes, GCP

### Code Review Env
- **URL:** https://huggingface.co/spaces/BugHunter28/code-review-env
- **Category:** DevTools, RL
- **Description:** OpenEnv RL benchmark for training AI agents on Python code review tasks.
- **Tech:** Python, Reinforcement Learning, OpenAI Gym
